text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the end of the year approaches, Tokai Teio
and I pay a visit to the Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oooh... I can barely move in this ocean of people!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But this is exactly what the Arima Kinen should be
like! The grand prix with all the popular runners!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I'm sure all this fuss is because of Prez! She
always draws a crowd!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be on that track next year too! They'll
be calling me Tokai Teio, Champion of the
Classics!
choice_data_list: We'd better do our best to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe, of course!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Air Groove! I knew it was you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah, Teio and her esteemed trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're here to watch too, huh? Who're you
rooting for? Prez? It's gotta be her! Right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Whenever President Rudolf is involved, your
vigor grows doubly tiresome...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Unlike you, I'm not here for fun. I've come purely
for self-improvement.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You're here to learn? You student council
members sure are something else.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Wait, huh? Air Groove, aren't you entering the
Arima Kinen yourself?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If I could, I would.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But it seems like my abilities have proved
unworthy of this great stage.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh... Even you didn't qualify?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If even Air Groove, who Tokai Teio couldn't beat,
couldn't qualify, then that means...
choice_data_list:
Looks like you need some serious skill to enter
this race.

Looks like you need some serious skill to enter
this race.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you're planning on surpassing Rudolf, then
you'd better watch carefully.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: See how she runs in a race even I'm no match for.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
See with your own eyes how high a wall you must
overcome.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How high a wall...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so the starting gates open for the big event
at the end of the year: the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This year's cream of the crop are turning for
home! Who will come out on top?!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Someone's breaking away from the pack! It's
Symboli Rudolf! Symboli Rudolf!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she finishes first! What a performance from
Japan's finest Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's natural to be at a loss for words, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even among the best of the best, she alone
stands supreme.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The road to achieving your dream will be more
treacherous than you could ever imagine.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Treacherous...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the train back, Tokai Teio is completely silent.
choice_data_list: Symboli Rudolf really is one of a kind, huh?
Symboli Rudolf really is one of a kind, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I mean, it's not like I didn't know that
before, but...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It wasn't until I debuted... until I started running on the same path she did, that I really got just how amazing she is.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now it seems like the closer I think I'm getting to
her, the further I really am.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... Mrghhh...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yup, that's enough! No matter how hard I think,
it's not gonna change anything!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've been thinking it over ever since the race
ended...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I still want to surpass her! No matter how
treacherous a journey it may be!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm still reeling from seeing how
outclassed I am. But...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I've always looked up to her! Before I entered the
academy up till now! And I always will!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But no matter how strong Prez is, I won't give up!
Ever!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure even Symboli Rudolf would be proud of
Tokai Teio's resolve...
choice_data_list: Go make your dream come true!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, leave it to me! I'm coming for you, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio reaffirms her dream to surpass Symboli
Rudolf and heads toward the Classics!
